title: 24-Pairs(48 Strips) Adhesive Picture Hanging Strips, Large 92x19mm Picture Canvas Hanger No Nails, Damage Free Double Side Hook Loop Mounting Tapes for Photo Frame Hanging, Mirrors and Decorations
features: Package includes: 24 Pairs of (48Pcs) Large no nails picture hanging strips 92 * 19mm. wall adhesive photo hangers are backed with high-quality adhesive backing, Perfect for photos, artwork, or decorations without damaging the wall.

NO Damage to The Wall: These wall picture grips feature double-sided adhesive hook and loop fasteners to securely hold your items in place, so you don't need nails or hammers to hang picture frames, murals, clocks, signs, holiday decorations, and other home decor wherever you want.

Easy to use and disassemble：1. Press the hanging hook and loop together until they stick together; 2. Then tear off the protective film on one side and press the hanging strip firmly on the painting. 3. Tear off the remaining protective film and press the picture frame on the wall to complete the installation. Press for 30 seconds on each side to ensure that the picture frame is firmly fixed. To disassemble, just press the top of the hanging strip and slowly pull it vertically from the bottom.

Wide Applications: These picture hanging no nails Strips hold strongly on a variety of indoor surfaces including finished wood, laminate,plastic, glass, tile, metal, other smooth surfaces. But DO NOT recommend for use on wallpaper, fabrics, textured walls, brick, or other rough and non-stick surfaces.
Service Satisfaction: If you have any questions about our Picture Hanging Strips, please feel free to contact us, we will give you a satisfactory answer.
description: Product Information Material: Polyethylene, Latex, paper Size: 19x92mm Color: White Package Included:24 pairs picture hanging strips Large wall hanging strips are backed with high-quality adhesive backing, stronger adhesion. Picture hanging strips let you fearlessly hang pictures without nails or tools. Suitable for most smooth surfaces, will not leave holes on your wall. Decorate how you want,when you want without damaging your walls. Sticky wall hanging strips work on a variety of smooth surfaces, including painted walls, glass, tile, metal, plastic etc. DO NOT recommend for use on wallpaper, fabrics, textured walls, brick, or other rough and non-stick surfaces. Note: When removing, you need to hold the top of the tape and slowly pull it down perpendicular to the ground.
